DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND DOCUMENT PRODUCTION REQUEST (SET ONE)--- DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART: INTERROGATORY #7: GRANTED. ALL GENERAL OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED AND ORDERED STRICKEN. THERE IS NO PROVISION FOR GENERAL OBJECTION IN THE CCP. THE REMAINING OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND FURTHER. REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION #13: DENIED. THE REQUEST IS OVERBROAD. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO NARROWING THE SCOPE OF THE REQUEST. REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION #14: DENIED. REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION #15: DENIED. THE REQUEST IS OVERBROAD. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO NARROWING THE SCOPE OF THE REQUEST. IF PLAINTIFF HAS NO RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, VERIFY THAT REPRESENTATION. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
